bank.retain_mission: Extract AP, loan-officer, and real-estate transaction-handling decisions.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about transaction types, counterparties, document requirements, and recurring exception cases. Ignore one-off entries.

mental_models.name: Transaction Types
mental_models.source_query: What transaction types and counterparties does the operation handle? Include required documents and SLAs.

mental_models.name: Exception Handling
mental_models.source_query: What exception cases recur in AP, lending, and real-estate transactions? Include resolution patterns.
